chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 380 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 2074/2025 (Ex) 3. For orders on CMA 3092/2025 4. For orders on CMA 2075/2025 (C/A) 5. For orders on CMA 3091/2025 (Review) 6. For hearing of CMA 1750/2025 7. For hearing of main case. 14.05.2025. Mr. Liaquat Ali Jatoi, Advocate for Petitioner No.1. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG. *********** SIP Muhammad Yaseen Hattar Investigating Officer submitted statement and furnished copy of final report under section 173 Cr.P.C by recommending the prosecution against accused persons. In view of such statement counsel for petitioner seeks disposal of this petition and submits that he will approach trial Court for appropriate relief. The petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
